item.title: Shop Local Market
item.description:
Saturday, July 4, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: TX

Discover one-of-a-kind gifts, handmade art, lush plants, craft coffee, sweet treats, and more at Shop Local Market’s weekend pop-up!

From Houston Farmers Market

Event details

item.title: Mariachi at the Market with Alamo Tamales
item.description:
Sunday, July 26, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: The Houston Farmers Market, 2520 Airline Drive, Houston, TX, 77009, United States

Enjoy live mariachi music at the Houston Farmers Market on the last Sunday of every month from 12–2 PM, presented in partnership with Alamo Tamales.

From Houston Farmers Market

Event details
